message:
test(fcp-mesh): add gossip IBLT fallback and change-limit rejection tests

Test that oversized reconciliation sketches fall back to empty IBLT
payloads with structured fallback_reason logs and that decode-budget
rejections surface a stable iblt_change_limit_exceeded reason code
with structured log fields (reason, peer_node_id, zone_id).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
